features: LIMITED EDITION WINTER FRAGRANCE: Crafted by Master Perfumers, embrace the season with a cosy blend of frosted black cherry, delicate snow blossom and a touch of candied vanilla
GEL TO FOAM BODY WASH: Our unique Foamburst technology transforms from a gel into clouds of rich, creamy foam lather cocooning skin in a rich foam
SILKY SMOOTH: This foaming body wash has a creamy lather that glides across the skin like silk, ideal for shaving
PERFECT CHRISTMAS GIFT: A thoughtful seasonal treat, ideal as a stocking filler, Secret Santa surprise, or festive self-care treat
BULK BUY: Includes 6 full-size bottles, perfect for sharing with the whole family or stocking up for the entire winter season with this limited edition scent
description: Product Description Our unique Foamburst technology transforms from a gel into mounds of creamy lather, cocooning skin in rich cleansing foam. Crafted with Master Perfumers, this limited-edition fragrance turns every shower into a wintertime treat. An indulgent blend of frosted black cherry, delicate snow blossom and a touch of candied vanilla wraps skin in a cosy, seasonal scent. 10 x More Foam * vs our regular shower gel Up to 40 Showers per pack Great for shaving. Ingredients Aqua, Isopentane, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Lauramine Oxide, Parfum, Acrylates/Steareth-20 Methacrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Acrylates/Palmeth-25 Acrylate Copolymer, PEG-200 Hydrogenated Glyceryl Palmate, Glycol Distearate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Piroctone Olamine, Lactic Acid, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Linalyl Acetate, Sodium Hydroxide, Glyceryl Oleate, Sodium Benzoate, EDTA, Citric Acid, CI 16035 , CI 17200, CI 61570 Directions Dispense a small amount of this foaming shower gel into the palm of your hand, as you massage the shower gel over body watch as it transforms into clouds of rich, foamy lather. Rinse thoroughly with water. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID EYE CONTACT - IRRITATING TO EYES. If this occurs, immediately rinse the affected area with clean water and SEEK MEDICAL ATTENTION. Warning: Pressurised container. May burst if heated. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. 9% by mass of the contents are flammable. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. Use only as directed. May cause staining. See more
